name: @levnikolaevich/hex-research-mcp
description: Markdown-first research hypothesis graph MCP server for goals, hypotheses, run manifests, task links, sources, and coherent goal metrics.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check bin/hex-research-validate.mjs && node --check scripts/quality-lib.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-quality-report.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-quality-docs.mjs && node --check evals/index.mjs && node --check benchmark/index.mjs

_dep_notes.gray-matter: Parses markdown frontmatter. Raw run manifests use a local conservative YAML-lite parser to avoid adding a second YAML dependency.
_dep_notes.zod: Zod schemas are registered directly with the current MCP TypeScript SDK.

author: Lev Nikolaevich <https://github.com/levnikolaevich>
